title: Rocket Report: India's Vikram-1 nears debut flight; AST to become rocket company?
summary: NASA’s SunRISE (Sun Radio Interferometer Space Experiment) mission will launch on a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket from the agency’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida, the space agency said this week .
